text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, AI can generate paintings, compose music, and even write stories. For example, an AI program can create a new song in the style of a famous artist, or write a poem on a given topic. This raises interesting questions. While AI can produce impressive results, it works by learning from existing human creations, not by having feelings or personal experiences. Human creativity comes from emotion, imagination, and life events. So, is AI truly creative? Many believe that AI is a powerful tool that can inspire and help humans, but it cannot replace the unique spark of human imagination. The best results often come when people and AI work together.
